  "row_map": [

  "col_map": [

  "notes": "Source table Exhibit F.3 (page 38, F-3) provides active member counts by age and service. Total row and column excluded. Empty cells transcribed as null. Age rows 'Under 20' and '20-24' summed for target '<25'. Age row 'Over 65' maps to target '70'. The source's coarsest service column 'Over 30' covers target bins '34' (30-34) and '40' (35-40), so share_even is declared for both."
}
